# This file is automatically generated from cmake.toml - DO NOT EDIT
# See https://github.com/build-cpp/cmkr for more information

# Create a configure-time dependency on cmake.toml to improve IDE support
if(CMKR_ROOT_PROJECT)
	set_property(DIRECTORY APPEND PROPERTY CMAKE_CONFIGURE_DEPENDS cmake.toml)
endif()

# Target: msgpack_example
set(msgpack_example_SOURCES
	cmake.toml
	msgpack.cpp
)

add_executable(msgpack_example)

target_sources(msgpack_example PRIVATE ${msgpack_example_SOURCES})
source_group(TREE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES ${msgpack_example_SOURCES})

target_compile_features(msgpack_example PRIVATE
	cxx_std_23
)

target_include_directories(msgpack_example PRIVATE
	"../include"
)

get_directory_property(CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} DEFINITION VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
if(NOT CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
	set_property(DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} PROPERTY VS_STARTUP_PROJECT msgpack_example)
endif()

# Target: msgpack_rpc_example
set(msgpack_rpc_example_SOURCES
	cmake.toml
	msgpack_rpc.cpp
)

add_executable(msgpack_rpc_example)

target_sources(msgpack_rpc_example PRIVATE ${msgpack_rpc_example_SOURCES})
source_group(TREE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR} FILES ${msgpack_rpc_example_SOURCES})

target_compile_features(msgpack_rpc_example PRIVATE
	cxx_std_23
)

target_include_directories(msgpack_rpc_example PRIVATE
	"../include"
)

get_directory_property(CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} DEFINITION VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
if(NOT CMKR_VS_STARTUP_PROJECT)
	set_property(DIRECTORY ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR} PROPERTY VS_STARTUP_PROJECT msgpack_rpc_example)
endif()
